170.name: Path Through the Pines
170.description: The trail continues through the thick pines, leading to the south and the north. It appears frequently traveled and there are obvious signs of wild life in the surrounding woods.

171.name: Shaded Forest Path
171.description: The thick canopy above lends itself to the heavy feel in the air, creating a rather gloomy atmosphere. The wildlife is slightly less pronounced there and there a slight stench air, wafting in on the southern breeze.

172.name: An Ominous Clearing
172.description: A clearing in the trees here does not seem natural. The trees along the edges are raggedly cut and you can't help but feel extremely exposed. Dark stains on the ground seem to draw your eye...blood?

173.name: An Ominous Clearing
173.description: Ragged stumps break up the ground of this odd clearing in the otherwise thick forest to the east and west and make traveling treacherous. Oddly enough, some of the stumps appear to have nicks and rents in them that are too small for an axe.

174.name: Between the Two Towers
174.description: You stand where the path passes between two large, wooden towers that are standing guard against intruders such as yourself. It continues to wind towards the south and north.

175.name: Below the Eastern Tower
175.description: A large, wicked looking tower rises above you and looks like a solid fortification, despite being made of wood, leather and rope. A wicked orcan guard grins with malice and hacks Flik's leg! Flik misses a wicked orcan guard.

npcs.name: Gorthaur the Cruel
npcs.description: muscular orc. Wicked knives at his belt look specifically designed to cause torment and you imagine he must enjoy using them.

npcs.name: Orcan archer
npcs.description: for anything that might threaten the clans territory.

177.name: Beneath the Western Tower
177.description: A crude yet sturdy wooden watchtower climbs out of the ground before you. Vicious spikes stick out at irregular intervals for no practical purpose that you can see, but it sure is intimidating. A painted orcan guard steps intrepidly toward his foe and swings cruelly at Neptune. Neptune dances to one side and grazes a painted orcan guard with her dagger.

npcs.name: Curumo the Painted
npcs.description: A massive orc towers over you and is clearly in charge of this tower. White paint on his face and chest in the shape of a large hand give him his nickname of "the Painted" and he stares at you with black eyes, gleaming with

npcs.name: Orcan archer
npcs.description: for anything that might threaten the clans territory.

178.name: A Dirt Path
178.description: The trees all around you have been hacked down in what looks to be an attempt to give the two northern watch towers a clear line of sight all around. Grey smoke rises above the trees to the southeast, indicating a large gathering with its size.

179.name: Path Through the Trees
179.description: A dirt path leads through thick trees of pine and oak, leading northwest and east. To the northwest, you see what looks like a break in the trees and to the east, the path leads towards a plume of grey smoke.

180.name: A Branching in the Path
180.description: Standing still to consider which of the path branches to take, you feel the hairs on the back of your neck begin to rise as if you were being watched from the surrounding trees.

181.name: The Forest Path
181.description: Soft leaves crunch under your feet as you continue along this path through the forest. Thick underbrush, laying just off the trail, hides all manner of critters, just as the branches above are burdened with a large variety of birds twitting away.

182.name: Main Forest Path
182.description: A wide, dirt path has been carved and maintained through the thick forest. Grey smoke curls above the trees to the east indicating some sort of settlement and a narrow path leads into the trees to the south.

183.name: Main Forest Path
183.description: The path stretching east and west here is beaten down by heavy foot traffic. Any outstretching branches from brush or trees have been cut down or broken as the path widens to the east. Thick boughs ladened with pine needles have been cast about on the path in a semblance of organization, likely to give the trail more resilience to the rain. The sounds of activity and a deep guttural language mingle with those of the surrounding forest.

184.name: Outside a Wooden Palisade
184.description: The absence of any signs of native wildlife accentuates the sounds of commotion that are prominent here. You stand outside of a viciously spiked wooden palisade that extends to the north and south as it encircles a large settlement. A small opening in the defenses to the east lead toward squat huts and whomever claims them, while the path west plunges into the thick forests.

npcs.name: Gorthaur the Cruel
npcs.description: muscular orc. Wicked knives at his belt look specifically designed to cause torment and you imagine he must enjoy using them.

npcs.name: Orcan archer
npcs.description: for anything that might threaten the clans territory.

2281.name: Path Through the Trees
2281.description: Signs of wildlife seem sparse here. The occasional frightened rabbit or squirrel scurry across the path as if being pursued and bird still twitter from the branches above, but the absence of deer seems conspicuous. Flik taps a multihued robe.

2282.name: Deep Forest Path
2282.description: The trees are thick around you and if not for the path giving direction, it would be easy to become lost in the endless marches of oak and pine as they vanish in the distance all around you. Thick leaves and sticks crackle softly under your feet as you continue.

npcs.name: Forest wolf
npcs.description: A powerful looking grey wolf does not appreciate your intrusion.

2283.name: Deep Forest Path
2283.description: The path meanders through the trees here in two directions. Both lead deep into the surrounding trees. A small hunting path appears to cross the main path here, going east to west.

npcs.name: Hunting wolf
npcs.description: a great help to hunting all manner of prey.

npcs.name: Orcan hunter
npcs.description: A member of the hunting caste in charge of providing meat for the clan, this orc takes his sacred duty seriously. Clad in leather and furs and wielding a long orcan bow, he hunts for prey.

2285.name: Trail Along the Stream
2285.description: The trail comes upon a wide stream here, almost a river. This far from the mountains the water has calmed enough to lose the white froth the indicates swift currents that would be too dangerous to drink from. In fact, a variety of tracks indicate this is a frequent stop for many an animal who lives in the surrounding forest.

2286.name: Trail Along the Stream
2286.description: The softly running stream cuts a wide swath in the forest on either bank and provides an ample water source for a large variety of creatures. On occasion you can see a trout leap from the water and flop back in with a splash.

npcs.name: Beautiful thirty-point buck
npcs.description: Samu drains a beautiful thirty-point buck's life! With a savage grunt, Samu swings his blade into a beautiful thirty-point buck. Thirty distinct point stand out on the a massive rack of antlers atop the head of a beautiful buck. Rippling muscles stand out under the glossy brown coat and he glances up at you, poised to bolt if needed.

2287.name: Light Dappled Path
2287.description: The hunting trail continues to snake a path through the trees, deep into the forest. Faint light makes it through the canopy above, creating dappled patterns upon the ground. The forest is really quite beautiful.

2288.name: Off the Trail
2288.description: You stand just off the hunting trail to the north, surrounded by endless trees on all sides. The slight rise in the underbrush to the west indicates that you are on the early slopes of a hill. Now what?

2289.name: Deep in the Forest
2289.description: You now stand on a noticeable slope and vast oaks and pines continue to tower above you as you survey the surrounding forest. The open sky is barely visible far above as leaves make up the majority of what you can see. Several larger trees have finally succumbed to gravity and lay horizontal in the immediate area.

2290.name: Before a Tree Den
2290.description: You stand before a vast fallen oak that lays against the slope of a hill, creating a small natural cave that has been further excavated by some great beast. A faint growling emits from a dark hole that leads the den.

2291.name: Inside the Bear Den
2291.description: A surprisingly spacious area, this den is clearly the home of a large and powerful beast to have dug so much. Shredded bark from the surrounding trees has been pulled into the den to use as nesting material and the bones of several animals and orcs lay scattered about.

npcs.name: Huge, grizzly bear
npcs.description: as that orc hunter in thinking you could claim this magnificent beast as a prize. It's too late to run now.

2292.name: Before a Large Den
2292.description: A slight hill rising a small ways out of the forest provides the perfect environment for a sizable den to have been burrowed out. A gaping entrance between to large rocks looks able to admit horses, much less wolves.

npcs.name: Den guardian
npcs.description: of joining either the warrior or hunter castes. He places the safety of the den above all else and will defend it to the death.

2293.name: Inside the Den
2293.description: Standing just inside a burrowed den you can't help but feel as if you are intruding somehow, like this is sacred ground and your presence is not welcome.

2294.name: Deep in the Den
2294.description: Faint light flickers in from the west, but is not enough to dispel the darkness.

npcs.name: Fangmaw shaman
npcs.description: rises in the back of his throat as he glares at you for intruding upon this

2295.name: A Large Chamber
2295.description: The vast chamber ends in a corner here where the southern and western walls meet. Gristly scenes decorate the walls of the cave, paintings depicting some sort of ritual. Iron manacles are fastened to the floor below, where torches flicker fitfully.

npcs.name: Fangmaw shaman
npcs.description: rises in the back of his throat as he glares at you for intruding upon this

2296.name: Altar to Maugrim
2296.description: A great altar of grey stone and ironwood venerates the wolf god, Maugrim, said to be the Father of All Wolves and the Lord of the Hunt. Fine pelts of all manner of animals, from rabbit to great brown bears cover the ground before the altar and dark stains slightly mar the surface.

npcs.name: Maugrim, the Great Wolf
npcs.description: Fangs the size of swords drip with ethereal saliva as the Maugrim the Wolf God snarls at your intrusion and profanity. Staring into his deep, intelligent eyes, the image of a rabbit before a hungry wolf flashes through your mind.
